core.label: AppleScript Fundamentals
core.description: macOS automation with natural language syntax.

topics.label: Script Editor
topics.description: Use Script Editor on macOS. AppleScript controls Mac applications.

topics.label: Tell Blocks
topics.description: tell application "name" to command. Send Apple Events to apps.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: set x to value. string, integer, real, boolean, list, record.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/then/else/end if, repeat with/times/while, try/on error.

topics.label: Handlers
topics.description: on handlerName(params) ... end handlerName. Reusable subroutines.

topics.label: Scripting Additions (osax)
topics.description: display dialog, do shell script, choose file. Extended commands.

topics.label: Automator Integration
topics.description: Use AppleScript in Automator workflows and Quick Actions.
